title: Dheendo

'''Dheendo''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Rodian/Legends|Rodian]] who served with the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic's]] [[Shroud Team]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. Originally a [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] operating out of the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Kazlin 5]], Dheendo joined the Alliance after a less-than-stellar career. Selected by [[Lieutenant/Legends|Lieutenant]] [[Dutra Zeneta]] to join Shroud Team, Dheendo served as the unit's primary [[Foster Agent]] based in [[Corint City]] on the planet [[Pirik]] in the [[Divis Arm/Legends|Divis Arm]]. A Foster Agent was one of the most dangerous Alliance postings, acting as conduits for stranded field [[Agent/Legends|operatives]] to rejoin the Rebellion. Serving as the team's primary contact on Pirik, Dheendo was the individual best known to Alliance operatives in the field.

==Biography==
[[Reproduction/Legends|Born]] sometime between [[24 BBY/Legends|24 BBY]] and [[20 BBY/Legends|20 BBY]],<ref name="D-age" /> the [[Rodian/Legends|Rodian]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] Dheendo initially found work as a [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] in the employ of [[Tyu]], a minor [[Crime lord/Legends|crime lord]] based on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Kazlin 5]]. Dheendo was regarded as a mediocre [[Hunting/Legends|hunter]] at best, mainly because he was not driven to succeed in his profession. Eventually, the Rodian joined the insurgent [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] and, sometime after [[0 ABY/Legends|0 ABY]], was selected by the [[Jin]] [[Lieutenant/Legends|lieutenant]] [[Dutra Zeneta]] to join [[Shroud Team]], a unit of all-[[Alien/Legends|alien]] [[Foster Agent]]s operating out of [[Corint City]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Pirik]] in the [[Divis Arm/Legends|Divis Arm]].<ref name="Shroud" /> A posting as a Foster Agent was one of the most dangerous assignments in the Alliance; they were points of contact for [[Agent/Legends|operatives]]—known as "orphans"—who were stranded in the field and looking to return to the Alliance. Their names and locations were common knowledge to field operatives, and if the operatives were caught by agents of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]], the possibility of the Foster Agent being compromised by a broken operative was high.<ref name="GG9">''[[Galaxy Guide 9: Fragments from the Rim]]''</ref> The team's all-alien composition was suited to the population of Corint [[City/Legends|City]], as [[Human/Legends|Humans]] made up only 5 percent of the settlement's 10 million inhabitants.<ref name="Shroud" />

Dheendo served as Lieutenant Zeneta's [[Executive officer/Legends|first officer]] as well as Shroud Team's primary Foster Agent. He was the agent whom most orphaned operatives knew in Corint City, and the Rodian maintained a seemingly random but preplanned schedule of a number of establishments within the city's [[Lowtown District]], where he met with operatives in need of relocation and redirection. Dheendo was fond of the social scene in Lowtown and spent much of his [[Time/Legends|time]] in the district, with the local patrols regarding him as a highly sociable individual.<ref name="Shroud" />

==Personality and traits==
Dheendo had [[Color/Legends|green]] skin and black [[Eye/Legends|eyes]].<ref name="Featured Artist" /> He was fond of the Lowtown District social scene and idolized Lieutenant Dutra Zeneta, hoping to be as "wise" as him one [[Standard day/Legends|day]]. As a front-line agent and former [[Bounty/Legends|bounty]] hunter, Dheendo was skilled with the use of a [[Blaster/Legends|blaster]] and carried a [[Blaster pistol/Legends|blaster pistol]], and he was trained in both [[Melee weapon/Legends|melee]] and [[Unarmed combat/Legends|unarmed combat]]. He was well-informed about the Corint City criminal scene and was connected in Lowtown. Dheendo was knowledgeable about alien [[Species/Legends|species]] and schooled in survival techniques and stealth. The Rodian's technical skills allowed him to [[Pilot/Legends|fly]] [[Realspace/Legends|space]] [[Transport/Legends|transports]],[[Astrogation/Legends|navigate]] them through [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]], and operate the weapons and [[Deflector shield/Legends|deflector shield]] systems aboard them. He was also skilled in operating and subverting security systems and locks.<ref name="Shroud" />

==Equipment==
Dheendo generally carried a [[Comlink/Legends|comlink]] and [[Datapad/Legends|datapad]] in addition to his weapon, and he wore a [[Blast vest/Legends|protective vest]] for defense. He also carried several sets of fake identification and a [[Security Systems Tool Kit|security tool kit]] to assist him in his work.<ref name="Shroud" />

==Behind the scenes==
Dheendo first appeared in an entry of "[[Cracken's Rebel Operatives (article)|Cracken's Rebel Operatives]]," a series of articles published in issues of [[West End Games]]' ''[[Star Wars Adventure Journal]]''. Dheendo was featured in [[Star Wars Adventure Journal 10|issue 10's]] article, which was released in [[1996]]. It was written by [[Craig Robert Carey|C. Robert Carey]] and featured a black-and-white illustration of the Rodian by [[Kathy Burdette]].<ref name="Shroud" /> In the [[Star Wars Adventure Journal 11|following issue]] of the ''Star Wars Adventure Journal'', the "[[Featured Artist: Kathy Burdette|Featured Artist]]" section included a colorized image of Dheendo.<ref name="Featured Artist" />
